final_prompt.prompt:
Create a luxury beauty product advertisement photo for a serum product, suitable for social media promotion (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs a "奢华精致" aesthetic — references in the spirit of La Mer / SK-II high-end cosmetics campaign photography, 1990s Vogue Paris beauty editorial visual language, contemporary 小红书 luxury skincare flat-lay culture; exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include a glass serum bottle with pale golden liquid visible through the glass, surrounded by rose petals and water droplet splashes
Scene/backdrop: must include a soft pink gradient background
Lighting/mood: needs a soft, natural light atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a soft pink, pale gold, and delicate rose direction — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: needs a glass-and-liquid surface treatment with translucency and fine water droplet detail — exact sheen and refraction level is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default
Avoid:
